pericopes.title: Jinei dingnu le jinei dingpa kitoh a akipa khom lhon
Kidei jong hi thina banga Thanei tah ahi

chapters.text: La lah a la kilhengdoh Solomon la chu.
O kaden, aman mi abengchopna ji akamsunga chu Keima beng achop hitave leh! Nangin neilungset chu Ju-ning sangin jong alhumjoi.
Nangman nakinuji thaotwi jong anam tui lheh-in, Namin jeng jong thaotwi kisung lha abange; Hichejeh tah jong chun Nu-ngah jousen nangbou nadei tauve.

Nanung nunga neikaiyin lang Kijam mangloi ta hite. Lengpan aindan sunga eipuilut’in, Nachunga keiho kakipa thanop diu, Nangin neilungset nau hi ju-ning sanga kalhumsah-uva, Kichentah le dih tah a amahon nadeichat diu ahi.
Vo Jerusalem chanute, Keima kavom nan kamel hoitah ahibouve, Kedar phaiya ponbuh kisong ho tobang Solomon pondal dia kikhaiho tobang kahi.

Kavouso avomjep jeh le nisan eikah dup jeh-in Neive mai mai hih-in; Kasopi pasal kanu chapate kachunga alung hanguvin, Hijeh chun lengpilei hon ngah-in eipansah tauve; Hijeh hin keiman kalengpilei joh Ki-nga thei louvin kaumlo tai!

Kalunga kadei chat jing nangin neiseipeh temin, Nakelngoi hon hoilama navah ding hiya, Sun tengleh hoilama nagakolsah ding ham? Ajeh chu ipi dinga keima hi vahvei banga kauma Nakelngoi honte kom dunga Naloi nagol ho koma kaum le ding ham?
Vo numei lah a mel-hoipen nu, Nangin nahet louva ahileh Kelngoihon te kikaina nung juiyin, Kelngoi ching ho ponbuh vel’a chun nakelngoinou vah-in.
Kadeinu, ken nang hi Pharaoh kangtalai kaiya pang Sakol lagol hoitah khattoh katekah jinge.
Nakhalhang teni jong nakijepna chengsen ahoisah lheh-in, Na-ngong chang jong sanajem pah hon ahoisah chome.
Keihon nakijepna ding sana nasempeh uving ting, Dangka vui ka-o peh dingu nahi.
Lengpa chu ajalkhuna alup pet’in, Kathao namtui chu ahung namcheng chung jenge.
Kadeipa chu kei din myrrh namtui sakhao dimset tobang ahin, Kanoi teni kah a kikhai jing sakhao bangin aume.
Kadeinu chu kei din henna khao pahcha pah le Enge’di lengpileiya pahcha boh tobang ahi.
Kivetemin kadeinu, nangma nahoi lheh jenge, Kiven kiven nahoi lheh jengin ahi; Namit chang teni jong chu Vakhu te nupa abang jenge.
Kadeipa nang jong kivetemin nahoi lheh jengin, Dihtah mongin dei dei naum jengin ahi. I-lupna lhon ding jalkhun jong hi A-engsil sel jengin ahi.
I-inkam jouse lhon jong cedar thing jeng ahin, I-insun chengse lhon jong chahthing ahi.
Kei hi Sharon pah le Phaicham dunga lily pah chu kahi.
Lingle khao lah a lily pah bangin, Kadeinu chu nu-ngah ho lah a aume.
Gammang thing lah a theithup phung bangin, Kadeipa chu gollhang ho lah a aume. Kipah thanomin keijong kadeipa lima katouvin. Atohga chu katep leh alhum keiye.
Kadeipan golvah kibolna in’a eipuilut’in, Eilungsetna chu kachunga ponlap bangin akikhange.
Lengpitheigan neivah-in lang, Theithup chang hon neivah-in tha thah neipen; Ajeh chu kadei behseh jeh-in Keiman kanatlo hel tai.
O kadeh, kadeipa khut veilam kihap’ing lang, A man jong akhut jetlamin eikoi leh!

Vo Jerusalem chanute nang ho thu kapeh nahiuve, Chule loujaova sapeng le sakhipi ho banga kahil nahiuve; Kidei kiti hi ama acham chama ahung kipat ngal louleh Nang hon tildoh tho ding le suhkhah tho din got dauvin.
Kadeipa ogin akijatai! Ven ven, ahung jenge; Molsang dunga ahung kichom chomin, Thinglhang vum dunga akichomle lei.
Kadeipa chu sapeng gol tobang ahin, Sakhi chalgol tobang jong ahi; Ven, hikoma khun ading jinge, Kabang tom’uva adinge; Bangkot vangkah dunga ahinve lhi le len, Bang vangkah dunga ahinvei.
Kadeipan kajah a thu aseiyin hitin ati, “Kadeinu mel-hoi tah hung thouvin, Hiti hin kijot mang ta hite; Ajeh chu vetan phalbi akichaitan.
Kho aphan, Gotwi jong akangin ajutapoi.
Leiset chunga pahcha ahung pah tan, Nop lasah phat ahung lhunge; Igamsung uva jong Vahui hamgin akijai.
Theichang phung jong a hung ga pan tan, Lengpithei phung jong apah pantai; Thing ho hin apah semdoh-in anam nguisoh tauve. Kadei mel-hoi nu hung kipatdoh loiyin. Hungin kilhai mang loi ta hite.

Vo songpi khi kah dunga kadei vakhu nou, Songpi kohom khi kah dunga thip beh cha cheng nu; Namai nei musah-in lang, Na-ogin neijah tei teiyin; Ajeh chu nangma ogin hi angei lheh jengin, Namai jong mel-hoi tah vetnom um ahi.
Lengpilei lai dung chil thanga pangji Se-alte leh se-al noute khu neimat peh-uvin; Ajeh chu keiho lengpilei hi Lengpithei pah lai ahitai.” ati.
Kadeipa chu keiya ahin, Keijong a ma a kahi; Kadeipan akelngoi hon chu Lily pah lah a avah jin alhajie.
Jingkah khohui theng ahung nun masang, Nisa lim jong akihei mang masangin, Hung kiheiyin kadei, molsang kikhap chet chut chung dunga Sapeng gol le sakhi chalgol bangin hung lhan.
Janin kajalkhun chunga Kalungthima kadeipa chu kahol holjie; Kadeipa kahol hol vangin kamudoh joupon. Kakouva ahijongleh aman eihoupoi.

“Keima kipatdoh-ing ting khopi sung dunga Gavah leng ting kholai veng ningkoi dung Gachon lenge, kalungthima kadeipa chu Gahol leng kate,” kati. Hijeh chun kadeipa chu kahol le len, Ahivanginla kamudoh jou deh poi.
Kho-ngah hon khopi sung dunga ava le nauva eimu’uvin, Kenjong, “Kalunga kadeipa chu namu khah um?” kati.

Amaho chu kadalha panbep nalaiyin Kalungthima kadeipa chu kamudoh paitai. Chuin kadeipa chu katuh chah den jengin Kachedoh sah tapoi; Kanu insunga kahin puilut kahsen Lhaso louhel’in katuh det jengin, Keima a-oisunga einavop kanu insung kalhut masangin Aindan sunga kapuilut kahsen kalhakang tapoi.

Vo Jerusalem chanute nang ho thu kapeh nahiuve, Chule loujaova sapeng le sakhipi ho banga kahil nahiuve; Kidei kiti hi ama cham chama ahung kipat ngal louleh, Nang hon tildoh tho ding le suhkhah tho din got dauvin.
Gammang lama meikhu lom banga Hung kijeldoh let lut pikhu ipi hiya, Myrrh namtui le bego kilhutnam bang jenga, Kivei mite thil gimnamtui jouse kihal-khom bang jeng ham?
Vetan, hiche khu Solomon tollai ahi! Tollai kimvela khun Israel mite mihat cheh Pasal thahat lai lai Mihem somgup jen ahung panguve.
Mihat ho khun chemjam akiko soh keiyun, Gal sat themsa cheh ahiuve; Pasal jouse khun akhel’uva chemjam akiko soh keiyun, Jan tengleh husa ngai lhi geh-in aum’ui.
Solomon lengpan ama kiputna din Lebanon lhanga thing chun tollai khat akiseme.
Tollai khom chengse chu dangka jengin asemin, Anung lam chu sanan atomin, Atouna mun chu ponsandup’in akiseme; Asung lam jong chu Jerusalem chanuten hoitah a asemdoh-u ahitai.
Potdoh loiyun gaveuvin, Vo Zion chanute Solomon lengpa khu! Anun lallukhuh akhuhpeh chu akikhuhin, Ajinei nikhoa dingin, alungthim kipa nikhoa din.

Kadeinu, kive temin nangma nahoi lheh jenge, Kiven kiven, nangma nahoi lheh jenge! Naponlu khuh sunga chun Namit chang teni jong vakhu tobang ahilhone. Nasamjong kelcha honlah abang jengin, Gilead molpanga lhaisuh tobang ahiuve.
Nahatu jouse jong kelngoipi amul kivousa tobang, Akisop thengsel nunga hung kipodoh tobang ahi; Kelngoipi chujat lah a anou soh kop hiya Khatcha jong akeova umlou tobang ahi.
Nanegei teni jong patsan tobang ahin, Nakamsung jong ahoi lheh jenge. Naponlu khuh sunga nabengphe te nijong chu Kolbuthei chang kikehso tobang ahilhone.
Na-ngong chang jong David insang tobang ahin, Galsat manchah jouse koina kisadoh chutoh abange; Hiche insang chunga chu lum sang khat jen kikhai ahin, Aboncha chu gal-hang ho lum jeng jeng ahibouve.
Nanoi teni jong apengkop, Lily pah lah a lha le sapeng nou pengkop teni tobang ahi.
Jingkah huitheng ahung nun masang, Nisa lim kihei masanga, Keiman Myrrh molsang kajot’a Bego lhang kajot tou ding ahitai.
Kadeinu nang vang nahoisoh keiye, Natichung abolkom le demna ding naumpoi.

Kaji dingnu Lebanon lhanga konin kilhon hite hungin, Hungin Lebanon lhanga konin kilhonin chete; Ama’na lhangvum, Senir mollubuh le Hermon vuma kon, Sakei bahkaiho kokhuh dunga kon leh Kei-ahisite chenna lhanga konin Potdoh loi jengin.
Kanao, kaji dingnu, Nangin kalungthim neilah mangpeh ahitai, Nangin neimitsih at’a Nakhivui sanapah jem kamuleh kalungthim alamange.
Kanao kaji dingnu, neilungset hi iti nop hitam! Nangin neilungset hi ju-ning sanga jong ichan geiya lhumjo hi tam! Nakinu thao namtui jong hi Thil mantui jouse sangin anamtuijoi.
Kaji dingnu, nakamsunga khoiju ahung long lhan, Naleigui noiya jong khoiju le bongnoi kikhol abange; Naponsil ho jong agimnamtui dan Lebanon lhang gimnamtui bep ahi.
Kanao kaji dingnu hi honlei kot-heh kikamkhum tobang ahin, Honlei kot-heh kikamkhum, twinah mohor kinamden tobang ahitai.
Nadong lha jong kolbuthei pah le Thingga hoipen, Henna khoa pah namtui pen tobang ahi.
Gimnamtui le sehlhum, kolju le thingthai, Bego thing jouse le Myrrh toh aloes namtui toh, gimnamtui atuipen tah,
Twinah phunga honlei kibol, Hinna twi putna twikul jong, Kang louhel’a hung long Lebanon lhanga vadung tobang nahi.

Vo sahlam khohui hung kipat loiyin, Vo lhanglam khohui hung nung loiyin! Kahon sung hi hinsem hoh loiyin, Agimnamtui hin gamle lei thongsoh hen. Chuteng kadeipa chu ahonleiya hung hen lang Honsunga theiga hoipen hung nehen.

Keima kahonleiya kahung tai, Kaji dingnu kanao; Keima gimnamtui chutoh Myrrh namtui tah jong chu kalou khome; Kakhoibal jong chu Kakhoiju chutoh kamen kanetai. Kalengpitwi jong kadonin, Kabongnoi toh kametai. Vo golte, neuvin lang don’uvin, Vo akideiho, nachim nanangin don’uvin!

Keima kalum nan kalungthimla aihmu poi. Hei, kadeipan kot akiu kiuve. “Kot neihonin, kanao kadeinu, Kadei chamkim nu kavakhu nou; Ajeh chu kalujang jouse daitwi achen, Kasamhol dung jong janlai daitwi lhan akotsoh-e,” ati.
Ken kavon kisut lhasoh ta Iti kakivon kit ding hitam? Kakeng phangte ni kisil ngimsoh ta Iti kachot thang kit thei ding ham?
Kadeipan kotvang kah ahinkhoiyin ahileh Hichun keijong kalungsung akithing thing jenge.
Kadeipa kot honpeh din kathouvin, Kakhut teni jong Myrrh namtui kanu kot’in, Kakhut jung jouse Myrrh twi kadekot’in, Kotkil chung dunga jong kanu namsoh keiye.

Keiman kadeipa kot kahonin, Ahinla kadeipa chu akiheiyin achemang tai. Kadeipan kajah a thu aseipet chun Kalungthim amangpai ding ahitai. Kadeipa chu kahol hoi jengin Ahivangin kamudoh deh tapoi. Kakou kou jeng vangin Amanla eihou deh sam tapoi.
Kho-ngah ho chu khopi kimvela akijotle nauva Keima eitoh khauvin, eijep’un eimavo tauve; Palvum dunga pal ngah a pang hon Kaponsil akilah mang tauve.
Vo Jerusalem chanute, najah-uva kasei a hi, Kadeipa chu namu’uva ahileh, Ama ka-ngaina lamin Kanatlo tai, ati tin seipeh tei teiyun.
Vo numei lah a numei mel-hoi chung nungpen nu, Midangin adeipa sanga nangin nadeipa ija chung chon ham? Nangin nadeipa chu itobanga chung chonjo hiya Midang deipa sanga nangin keiho thu neipeh-u ham?
Ken kadeipa chu a ngouseh-in, Avouso jong atisan son ahi; Pasal sang som lah-a jong Kadeipa chu akithangpen tah ahi.
Alubuh jeng jong sana tum hoipen tah tobang ahin, Alujang sam jong akilchit chet’in, Ajangsam jouse chu Va-ah vom bangin avomsoh keiye.
Amitchang teni jong vakhu teni tobang ahin, Twinah phung koma touva, Bongnoi twiya kisil thenga Kitoh chet’a kito tobang ahi.
Angeiphe teni jong gimnamtui adimset jengin, Anamtui tui jeng asosah sah jenge; Akamsung jeng jong lily pah tobang ahin, Myrrh namtui twi avat lhahsah sah jenge.
Abanjang te jong sana tum kimeh jol tobang ahin, Sana pah jem kijempol tobang ahi; Atahsa atichung jong saiha kisui abangin, Sapphire songa kitom jolsel abange.
Akeng teni jeng jong chu Sana khomto dunga ngunsong khom kitungdoh tobang ahi. Amaiso amelput jeng jong chu Lebanon lhanga cedar thing hoipen tah tobang ahi.
Athusei mong mong jong angei behseh jengin, A-ilam ilama aboncha kadeipa chu deichat chat um jeng ahi. Vo Jerusalem chanute, Hitobang hi kagolpa, kadeipa chu ahiye.
Vo numei lah a mel-hoipen nu, Nadeipa nalungsetpa chu hoilama che hiya. Nakilungsetpi pa chu hoilama che hitam, Hitobanga keihon ama kahol diu chu?
Kadeipa chu gimnamtui dimsetna Ahonlei langa achesuh tan, Honlei lai dunga chu kelngoi hon vah a Lily pahho kilo khom dingin agoi.
Kei hi kadeipa ding kahin, Kadeipa jong chu kei ding ahi; Kadeipan lily pah lah a khun Akelngoihon avah-in an aneh sah jie.
Kadeinu, nangma Tirzah hoiyin nahoiyin, Jerusalem mel-hoiyin nahoiye; Chujongleh ponlap tampi kidop’a kon Tijat kichat umtah sepaite toh nabang jenge.
Neivet dan kihei mang jengin. Ajeh chu namit tenia neivet chun umthim mon eilhai; Nasamjang jong kelcha hon kikaitoh chet abangin, Gilead lhang panga kijotsuh abanguve.
Nahatu jouse jong kelngoipi amul kivousa tobang, Akisop thengsel nunga hung kipodoh tobang ahi; Kelngoipi chujat lah a anou soh kop hiya, Khatcha jong akeova umlou tobang ahi.
Naponlu khuh sunga nabengphe teni jong Kolbuthei chang kikehso tobangin asanpeh jenge.
Lengnu somgup alhingin, Thaikem somget jen alhingin, Nu-ngah a nu-ngah la Sima simjou dol ahipoi.

Ahin keidia chamkimsoh kavakhu nou. Achangseh seh a bou umah ahin, Anun jong alungset behseh jeng ahin, Ahingnu anu dia phatmona beihel ahiye. Nu-ngah hon amudoh-uvin, Nun nom nu atiuvin ahi; Lengnu ho le thaikem hon jong Kadeinu hi apacha soh keiyui.
“Jingkah khovah vah banga hung vah the thu khu koi hiya, Lhathah hoiya hoi, nisa vah a vah, Ponlap tampi kidop’a kijot sepaite banga Tijat kichat um khu koi ham?” atiuve.
Keijong beleiya bepah vedin kachesuh in, Phaichama pahcha pahho ve dingin kachei; Lengpigui ho dondoh soh tam, Kolbuthei ho jong pahsoh tam, tia ave din kachei.
Keiman kahetdoh masangin keidia milen milalpa koma Kalungthimin akangtalai sunga eitousah tai.

Vo Shu’lam mi, hung kile kit’in, hung kile kit’in, Keihon kavet theina diuvin hung kile kittei teiyin! Ipi dinga Shu’lam nu-ngah nu chu navet khoh khoh ding ham? Mi alama golni jena kigol kah-a lam dinga kigo banga?

Vo lengnu tobang nu-ngah nu, Nakengchot teni sunga nakeng phang teni chu itivet’a vetnom um hitam! Nakhelphe kikhil leh luh teni jong chu Sana pah jem abang jengin, Pasal khut themtah khat’in Akhut tah a asuitoh le le abange.
Nalaimu jong chu lhengkam bempel tobang ahin, Ju akisun jongleh va-lha louhel tobang ahi; Na-oipoh jong chu suhlou chang kihuivum abangin, Lily pah jousen aumkimvel soh keiye.
Nanoi teni jong apengkop Sapeng nou teni tobang ahi.

Na ngong chang jong saiha Insang kisa tobang ahin, Namit chang teni jong chu Heshbon phai le Bath-rab’bim kelkot phunga Twikul kisem ho bangin adulkeove. Nanah-lhong jong chu Damascus kho kimuna Lebanon lhanga insang kisadoh tobang ahi.
Naluchang jong Carmel molsang bangin akidoh sangin, Nasamlom kikhai lha ho jong ponsandup kikhai lha tobang ahi. Nasamboh a chu lengpa geiya Soh kihen-oh banga aoh den ahitai.
Vo deichat chat um kadei nu-ngah nu, Itobanga hoi nahiya iti lung lhai lhai um nahim!
Nangma chahthing sanin nasangin, Nanoi teni jong chahthing pahmum abange.
Keiman ‘Chahthing phunga kaldoh ing ting, Apahmum ho khu katuh chah den ding ahi,’ kati. O kaden, nanoi teni chu lengpitheiga aboh tobang hihen, Nanah hai gimnam jong theithup gimnam tobang hihen;
Mi beng nachop teng jongleh Ju-ning tuitah kidon nal-heova vah lut bangin, Kamsung dung le Hani kah dunga vahlut soh kei hen.
Keima kadeipa ding kahin, Aman adeichat chu kei ding ahi.
Kagoldei hungin, loujao dunga kon hitin, Mi kho dunga hung geh den hite;

Jingkah matah-in lengpileiya che hitin, Lengpigui ho pah tam gave hite; Lengpigui pahmum chu Pah lhasoh hitam, Kolbuthei ho jong chu Apah lhasoh a hitauvam; Hikoma chun keiman kadeilona Kapeh ding lom chu napenge.
Joldei ai jong agimnam atuisel jin, I-kotpi phung dunguva jong thingga phatah tah aume; Thingga thah jong thingga lui jong, Vo kadeipa, aboncha nang dia kakhol ahiye.
O kaden, nang chu kei dingin Kanu pheichunga anoitwiya kivahdoh kasopi bep bep nahin. Inpo lama natoh kha jong leng Nabeng kachop peh ding, koiman nahsahmoa eiboldeh lou ding ahi.
Nangma kapui puiya kanu insung kalhut ding, Eihingnu kanu indan sunga kapuilut
O kadeh, kadeipa khut veilam kikhap’ing lang A man jong akhut jetlamin eikoi leh!
Vo Jerusalem chanute nang ho thu kapeh nahiuve, Kidei kiti hi ama cham chama ahung kipat ngal louleh, Nang hon tildoh tho ding le Suh khah tho din got dauvin.

Gammang lah a hung kondoh khu koi hiya, Adeipa chunga ki-ngainu khu koi ham? Theithup phung noiya chu Keiman kasuh khahsa nahitan; Hikoma chu nanun so-nat nathoh pia, Nahing nun hikoma chu naoso-nat nathohpi ahi.

Nalungthima jong mohor kinam bangin nei namin, Nabanjang a jong mohor kinam bangin nei namin; Ajeh chu kideijong hi Thina thanei bang a thanei tah ahi; Kithangset jong vang hi Lhankhuh sung banga melse veng vung ahibouve. Ahung kitajah tengleh Meisi kitahjal abang jengin, meikong al-leng lung abangjie.
Kidei kiti hi twi tampin jong alhautam thei lou ding, Twisoh jengin jong alhoh mang louhel ding ahi. Mihem khattouvin ainsunga anei agou abonchan Kidei khel hin tohdoh jongleh imachan kigelpon te.
Keihon sopi numei neocha khat kaneiyun, Ama hi anoi teni abohhih laiye; Min ahung kijol nikho teng Keihon kasopinu’u dia hi ipi kabolpeh diu hitam?
Ama hi pal ham khat hileh Achungvuma gal panmun dangka a jong kasem theiyu, Kotpi ham khat hiya hijongleh Thing mantam cedar thinga katom-jolsel theiyu ahi.
Keima pal tobang kahin, Ka-noi teni jong insang kisa intingvum abange; Hichun keijong kadeipa mitmun Lungmon mon umin kaumdoh tai.
Ba’al-ha’mon kiti laiya chun Solomon in lengpilei khat aneiye; Chuin lengpilei chu angah ho angasah tai; Angah jousen athingga man ding dangka shekel sang khat apeh cheh diu ahi.
Kalengpilei, keiya mong mong hi Kachangseh a kachan ding ahin; Theiga ngah a pang ho chu Ja ni bou chang diu ahiye.
Vo honlei laiya chengpa, Kaloi kagolten na-ogin a ngaiyuve, keijong neijah sah-in.
Hungloi loiyin a kadeipa, gimnamtui molsang dunga chun Sapeng ham, sakhigol ham bangin hung kichom chomin!
